title: Stephen Furlan
content:
People.ContactEmail sfurlan@mccarthy.ca
- University of Toronto
With unparalleled project finance experience, Stephen provides clients with strategic solutions to sophisticated lending and financing matters.
Stephen is a partner in the Toronto office. Recognized as one of Canada’s leading project development and financing lawyers, Stephen’s practice is focused on helping clients with high profile, complex national and international  project development and financing.
Stephen leverages over 30 years of experience to provide clients with practical guidance and solutions. Clients appreciate his commitment to understanding the business drivers  behind every transaction.
As a pioneer in Canadian project finance, Stephen has acted as lead counsel for lenders, borrowers and governments on the project financing of power and infrastructure projects at the intersection of Government policy and private capital, which also frequently involves Aboriginal communities.
